errors.fullName: Please enter your full name (at least 2 characters).
errors.consent: You must agree to the privacy policy to submit.
errors.preferredDate: Preferred date must be today or later.
errors.generic: Some details are invalid. Please check and try again.
errors.rateLimited: You are submitting too quickly. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.server: Could not submit. Call hotline {hotline} for help.
errors.network: Connection error. Call hotline {hotline} or try again.

page.title: Book a free test drive
page.subtitle: Pick a car, showroom, and date — we handle the rest.
page.step1Text: Fill the 1-minute form — free, no commitment.
page.step2Text: An advisor calls back within 5 minutes to lock time and showroom.
page.step3Text: 30-minute drive with a specialist, plus on-road pricing.
page.why1: All 6 model lines ready, fully charged.
page.why2: Specialist rides along — range & charging answers.
page.why3: Unlock this month’s offers when you deposit after the drive.
page.why4: Home test drives available within the city.
page.showroomEmpty: Call the hotline for the nearest showroom.

depositPage.title: Deposit / Consult
depositPage.subtitle: Leave your details — an advisor will call to confirm offers and deposit steps.
depositPage.step1Text: Choose a model line and leave your phone number.
depositPage.step2Text: Confirm variant, monthly offers, and appointment.
depositPage.step3Text: Complete deposit paperwork and receive hold confirmation.
depositPage.why1: Hold your allocation and current monthly offers.
depositPage.why2: Clear guidance on on-road price & financing.
depositPage.why3: Paperwork support and delivery to your door.
depositPage.why4: A team tracks progress until you receive the car.
depositPage.showroomEmpty: Call the hotline for the nearest showroom.
